original_query: SELECT "t0"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "EMPNO", "ENAME", "JOB", "MGR", "HIREDATE", "SAL", "COMM", "DEPTNO", "SLACKER", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A') AS "t0" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "DEPTNO", "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT") AS "t1" ON "t0"."JOB" = "t1"."NAME" AND "t0"."f9" = "t1"."f2" GROUP BY "t0"."JOB"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminated unnecessary subqueries by removing the LEFT JOIN operation that doesn't affect the final result
Simplified the query by removing the unnecessary LEFT JOIN and directly selecting from the EMP table
Removed the redundant join condition that doesn't contribute to the final result set
